OBJECT Page 138 Posted Purchase Invoice
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=09/15/23;
    Time=10:18:00 AM;
    Modified=Yes;
    Version List=NAVW1.x,N.7.2.1,APOP000010;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Posted Purchase Invoice;
    Description=PA032178,PA037533;
    InsertAllowed=No;
    DeleteAllowed=No;
    ModifyAllowed=No;
    SourceTable=Table122;
    SourceTableView=SORTING(Order Type,Buy-from Vendor No.)
                    WHERE(General Document=FILTER(No));
    PageType=Document;
    RefreshOnActivate=Yes;
    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start INC
                 EnableImporter();
                 // Stop INC
               END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000003;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=RelatedInformation }
      { 1101353000;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      Name=LineBtn;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Line;
                      Visible=LineBtnVisible }
      { 1101353009;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Item Charge &Assignment;
                      Description=PA037533;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Allocations;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start INC
                                 CurrPage."Sales Lines".PAGE.ItemChargeAssgnt;
                                 // Stop INC
                               END;
                                }
      { 53      ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Invoice }
      { 45      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=F7;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Statistics;
                      Description=PA037533;
                      RunObject=Page 400;
                      RunPageLink=No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Promoted=No;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Statistics;
                      PromotedCategory=Process }
      { 55      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Co&mments;
                      Description=INC,PA037533;
                      RunObject=Page 66;
                      RunPageLink=Document Type=CONST(Posted Invoice),
                                  No.=FIELD(No.),
                                  Document Line No.=CONST(0);
                      Promoted=No;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=ViewComments;
                      PromotedCategory=Process }
      { 89      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=Shift+Ctrl+D;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Dimensions;
                      Description=PA035597,PA037533;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Dimensions;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 ShowDimensions;
                               END;
                                }
      { 1055603 ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Text;
                      Description=PA037533 }
      { 95      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Header Text;
                      Description=PA037533;
                      RunObject=Page 5028698;
                      RunPageLink=Document Type=CONST(Invoice),
                                  Document No.=FIELD(No.),
                                  Header/Footer=CONST(Header);
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Note }
      { 96      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Footer Text;
                      Description=PA037533;
                      RunObject=Page 5028698;
                      RunPageLink=Document Type=CONST(Invoice),
                                  Document No.=FIELD(No.),
                                  Header/Footer=CONST(Footer);
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Note }
      { 1900000004;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 57      ;1   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Navigate;
                      Description=PA037533;
                      Promoted=No;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Navigate;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 Navigate;
                               END;
                                }
      { 1055601 ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Print;
                      Description=PA037533 }
      { 56      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Ellipsis=Yes;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Print;
                      Description=PA037533;
                      Promoted=No;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Print;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(PurchInvHeader);
                                 // Start INC
                                 PurchInvHeader := Rec;
                                 // Stop INC

                                 // Start PA032178
                                 PurchInvHeader.PrintRecords(TRUE);
                                 // Stop PA032178
                               END;
                                }
    }
  }

    { 87  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Currency Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD';
                Importance=Promoted;
                OnAssistEdit=BEGIN
                               ChangeExchRate.SetParameter("Currency Code","Currency Factor","Posting Date");
                               ChangeExchRate.EDITABLE(FALSE);
                               IF ChangeExchRate.RUNMODAL = ACTION::OK THEN BEGIN
                                 "Currency Factor" := ChangeExchRate.GetParameter;
                                 MODIFY;
                               END;
                               CLEAR(ChangeExchRate);
                             END;
                              }

    { 1900000007;0;Container;
                ContainerType=FactBoxArea }

    { 1901138007;1;Part   ;
                Description=PA037533;

  }
  CODE
  {
    VAR
      PurchInvHeader@1000 : Record 122;
      ChangeExchRate@1001 : Page 511;
      LineBtnVisible@19039005 : Boolean INDATASET;

    PROCEDURE __IMM__@1101353000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableImporter@1101353001();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353000 : Record 79;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN BEGIN
        LineBtnVisible := TRUE;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area PartsPurchase
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA032178   11.01.11 PR 2501860: Modified form property 'SourceTableView' to display only
                                             Posted Parts Purchase Invoices.
                                             As the records are filtered based on area in form level,
                                             in print button, conditions can be removed to open the repective area report.
      PA032396   22.03.11 GE DeleteAllowed Property Changed to No
      PA032473   17.05.11 MA 3745287: Set correct Filter to call forms from multiple menu areas
      PA032727   12.07.11 PR Removal of DocMS functionality. Deleted 'Call Doc. Management System' menuitem in Functions
                             menubutton.
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA032651   25.04.12 DR 6012646: DEU and ENU Captions corrected
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA033733   10.12.12 DR DE Captions added for version: N.6.1.2
      PA033082   30.03.12 DR 12:51:10 All available FlowFilter fields from the SourceTable added to the SubFormLink of attached FactBox
                             Pages
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA035901   13.11.14 CH NAV 2013 R2 General Ledger Integration.
      PA036773   24.09.14 LR Set propperty IsFilter to TRUE in filters of the FactBoxes
      PA036548   24.09.14 LR Merge PA036373
      PA038140   30.07.15 UX "Your Reference" added.
      PA037533   19.10.15 GU Actions modified and field sequence rearranged for UI.
      PA041728   15.09.16 GW Removed link to wrong Factbox.
      PA041729   15.09.16 GW Merge of PA041728.
      PA041023   27.12.16 SV Enabled fields "Reference License No." and "Supply VIN".
      PA041187   23.02.17 SV 88803 Default show/hide enhanced in fields "Reference License No.".
      PA041187   02.03.17 JV 89776 "Supply VIN" and "Reference License No" placed after Buy from Vendor Address and City
      EU.0114065 25.03.21 DS Added page filter on "General Documents" field as False.
      APOP000010 15.09.23 QQ Added Esker RUID field.
    }
    END.
  }
}
